prompt: A stylized waist-up to three-quarter portrait of a Japanese woman inspired by Non, Nōnen Rena, centered and facing forward with a calm, poised expression and her hands gently clasped at her waist. She has medium-length dark black hair, softly layered and swept back from the face with a slightly tousled crown, and fair skin. She wears a luxurious deep crimson velvet dress with a dramatic oversized ruffled collar, intricate vertical lace trim down the bodice, and matching lace-trimmed cuffs, giving the look a romantic vintage elegance. Render the figure in a painterly, polished editorial illustration style with realistic anatomy, soft shading, rich fabric texture, and subtle highlights on the velvet. Place her against a handmade torn-paper collage background themed around Japan, composed of layered textured paper in indigo blue, teal, sage green, cream, and gold leaf tones. Include exactly 5 visible torii gate silhouettes scattered across the background, exactly 3 pagoda silhouettes on the right side and lower right, and painted bamboo leaves integrated into several paper layers. The collage should feel artisanal and refined, with irregular ripped edges, overlapping papers, and decorative gold accents. Vertical composition, full image dominated by the figure, with the background serving as a cultural, elegant backdrop. No text, no border, no extra objects, sophisticated museum-poster aesthetic.
